description: Style Note tonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out! Product Details Crafted in fine fabric this trendy dress from Tonga has a square neckline, cut out bow at the neck, elbow length sleeves with elastic in the middle of the sleeve, gathered from the hip down with two insert pockets Material and Care 20% polyester, 75% rayon and 5% spandex Dry clean only Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
